title: WesterosCraftEssentials
description: Essential functionality for the WesterosCraft project
body: WesterosCraftEssentials provides server and client side functionality related to the WesterosCraft modpack and server. Allows server owners to toggle things like plant growth, blocking sand falling, and more in config/westeroscraft-essentials.json. Also provides the commands /nv, /ptime  and /pweather that works only for yourself in order to set the time and weather.
